title: Emerald Items
description: The mod adds emerald armor, tools and crafts.
body:
## Description

The mod adds emerald armor, tools and crafts.

Emerald will no longer be used only for trading with villagers. Now the material will find a new use: you can create a sword, tools, and even a full set of armor from it. Emerald has high strength and value, which means things made from it will be useful.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4082f962fd94fcc64570768a53cec497448ed88.jpeg)
